[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:10 pm Very pretty, but what precisely is it? Just a walkthrough of some of the imagery of Q, set to some original music? (Not that there's anything wrong with that, mind. I'm just seeking clarification.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:19 pm Moved to general Rebuild thread. This was also posted and being discussed in the Animator Expo thread . Slowly making my way through these in order, so my thoughts later.

[]:             Quote Post by lastcody » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:21 pm based on the entry plug and this SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:24 pm There was this one shot a very symbolic one. Where Shinji, has his heart (in shape of an Eva Core) ripped out of his chest. Made me hurt inside. Poor kid. . . But other than that maybe the earth isn't dead and maybe the time loop theory has some merit (them showing NGE, EOE, 2.0, and 3.0 Asuka all together) we still don't know what's going on. So is this like a teaser trailer or something?

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:25 pm Shinji boy.... The pipes are calling.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:28 pm I slept three hours the other night. I should be sleeping now. Was watching an ASMR video (check those out if you have trouble falling asleep). Suddenly, a new evageeks tweet (I get notifications). Here I am lol. That short was so little, yet so beautiful. Final Impact is gonna be some fucked up shit. Picture me makoed.

[]:             Quote Post by skulkidcachi90 » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:31 pm So Rei Q is gonna die Before doing the peaces with Shinji ?

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:32 pm skulkidcachi90 wrote: So Rei Q is gonna die Before doing the peaces with Shinji ?

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:34 pm It's all happening in Shinjis Broken mind. For all we know everything's symbolic.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:40 pm The Four Asukas: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by MrSniper1401 » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:41 pm What if besides fixing up the dub, the reason for 3.0's American release being delayed for so long was so it could include this short?

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:42 pm I know some people are annoyed by the sequel theory. I personally don't care. As long as it's something that adds. If Rebuild is a sequel. But here were some clear NGE references. The panty flashing Asuka from 8, and the hospital Asuka from EoE. WTF Edit: Heh, Guy Nacks made a better post. :P

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:42 pm As interesting as this is, only two things jump out at me: 1. The director, Tatsuya Kushida. This guy is a background artist and occasionally art director who has been with Gainax since Wings of Honneamise. He has worked on NGE and ENT as well as more recently on The Wind Rises and Kaguya-hime for Ghibli. Other than that there's not much info about him. He's also the one responsible for the cat illustration in the 2015 calendar: https://yande.re/post/show/276626/ Unlike the rest of the artist for the calendar he doesn't have an extensive bio written up next to his name. Just 3 words: "Animation art director". Given the subtitle that this is just his sketches set to music, is it suggesting this is nothing more than the extension of the cat pic, which is still of dubious canonicity? :P 2. Yesterday, a day before this new short was revealed Minna no Evafan made an interesting post: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3482.html In it they mention that given what we know from the 2.0 CRCs, Q's short running time and what we see in the making of feature, and the interviews: -2.0 was broken down into 4 parts: A, B, C, D -we know from Q making-of that Mari ejecting Shinji, pretty much the tail end of the movie is cut #1465 is Part C -Q's Part A and B, up to the title break amount to 53 minuts. Part C is only 38 minutes -we also know that the actual end with Asuka rescuing Shinji and the 3 kids walking off into the distance are cuts #1011-1033, meaning they were finalized in script/storyboards before the entire climactic dogma battle and 4th Impact -we know from Megumi Ogata's interview in the theatrical booklet that after Kaworu died she couldn't bring herself to do any more lines and Anno was ok with that and adjusted the movie accordingly (I'm about 90% sure on this one, the translation on the wiki is only partial but i definitely remember seeing more bits of it on the internet.) Given all of the above the theory is that Q originally had 4 parts just like 2.0 but Part D got dumped. The storyboards presented in the Shiro Sagisu video of the kids wandering the desert presumably came from that dumped Part D. This all leads to speculation that Evangelion 3.0+1.0 is not in fact Shin/Final, but instead Evangelion Q as was released, plus the initially dumped Part D reattached. Thus instead of Q, we will get 急, as Jo-ha-kyū (序破急) implied from the start and only after that we'll get Shin/Final.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:46 pm Given the subtitle that this is just his sketches set to music, is it suggesting this is nothing more than the extension of the cat pic, which is still of dubious canonicity? :P

[]:             Quote Post by MrSniper1401 » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:49 pm If that turns out to be true, I would get the biggest case of blue balls ever.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Thu Dec 18, 2014 9:50 pm Can't wait to see what Demolition D has to say about this. . .

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Thu Dec 18, 2014 10:00 pm They're directly merging EoE with Q. That reflection in the lake with Shinji just spells it out.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Dec 18, 2014 10:02 pm kuribo-04 wrote: Anno is credited as author though.
